subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Make this lowly servant of Thine to be a herald of glad-tidings unto his kindred and a warner unto those who follow the people of violation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبدک الفقیر اجعله بشیرا لذوی قرباه و نذیرا لمن اتبع اهل النقض
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
